fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the bin template.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the bin creation template.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code that will apply to all the bins set up with this bin template.

fields.name: Bin Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the bins that are set up using the bin template.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone where the bins created by this template are located.

fields.name: Bin Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a bin type code that will be copied to all bins created using the template.

fields.name: Warehouse Class Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a warehouse class code that will be copied to all bins created using the template.

fields.name: Block Movement
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the movement of a particular item, or bin content, into or out of this bin, is blocked.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a special equipment code that will be copied to all bins created using the template.

fields.name: Bin Ranking
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin ranking that will be copied to all bins created using the template.

fields.name: Maximum Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum cubage that will be copied to all bins that are created using the template.

fields.name: Maximum Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum weight that will be copied to all bins that are created using the template.
